summary: Storage account events are visibly routed into an Azure Function destination, so this path already looks execution-capable from the current control-plane read path.
Custom topic events are visibly delivered to a webhook destination. The base command keeps the callback target redacted, but this route already crosses the normal Azure service boundary.
